scripts.test: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests/unit -p 'test_*.py' && rm -rf .tmp-test && tsc --ignoreConfig --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --outDir .tmp-test --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck src/server/sqlite.ts src/server/queries.ts && node --test tests/integration/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: node e2e/fixtures/seed-e2e-db.mjs && npm run build && playwright test
scripts.lighthouse:ci: node e2e/fixtures/seed-e2e-db.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/run-lhci.mjs
